product.name: wansview Security Cameras Wireless Outdoor-2K Dual Lens Home Security Cameras, 360° View, Solar Panel Battery Powered, Color Night Vision, PIR Sensor, IP65 Waterproof, Work with Alexa, B7 2P White
features: 2K Dual-Lens Zoom & 3MP Clarity at 30 Feet: Wansview Cameras for home security deliver crisp 2K images with dual lenses—3.6mm wide-angle for broad views of your yard or driveway, and 8mm telephoto for detailed close-ups of visitors or packages. With 64x digital zoom, this outdoor camera wireless clearly identifies people approaching your house up to 30 feet away, ensures no detail is missed. Day or night, enjoy top-notch surveillance & security for your home

Non-Stop Solar Power & Easy Set up: The security cameras wireless outdoor work 365 days a year without the need to replace batteries, giving you peace of mind. The removable solar panel ensures that the home security cameras are charged indefinitely, so you can place it anywhere around your property without worrying about power outlets, providing you with reliable home security all year round. Quick and easy installation in less than 5 minutes via a 2.4GHz WiFi connection ( 5Ghz not supported )

Flexible 360° Pan & Tilt & Color Night Vision: Equipped with a 355° pan and 90° tilt, this outdoor security camera ensures complete protection of your surroundings. Whether it's your front porch, backyard or driveway, enjoy uninterrupted surveillance with it. With 4 LED lights and 4 infrared lights, the solar camera outdoor wireless capture up to 10 meters of clear, colorful footage in low light, making it the perfect home security camera for day and night. 2.4GHz WiFi supported only

Smooth 2-Way Audio & Real-Time Alerts: The security camera has a built-in microphone and speaker that you can enjoy crystal-clear two-way talk with visitors & family. The security camera outdoor with advanced PIR human detection will send real-time alerts to your phone when the motion is detected, while the built-in siren deters intruders, keeping your property safe. This wifi camera is perfect for monitoring deliveries, securing entrances, and ensuring peace of mind day and night

Local/Cloud Storage & Works with Alexa: This outdoor camera wireless supports up to 128GB of SD card storage (not included) to record every important moment, such as package deliveries & suspicious activity. Optional cloud storage (paid) is also available for automatic backup of important videos to prevent loss. This wireless cameras for home security works with Alexa assistant, you can view real-time footage instantly using voice commands. Day or night, this solar-powered camera keeps your home safe
